diagnostics.toolingDescription: Verifying the bundled ffmpeg and ffprobe binaries execute.

probe.title: Inspect media
probe.description: Pick a media file and let the main process probe it with ffprobe and return its metadata.

errors.unsupportedPlatform: No ffmpeg binary is available for this platform.
errors.ffmpegSpawnFailed: Could not start ffmpeg/ffprobe (binary not found).
errors.probeFailed: Could not inspect the file. It may be unsupported or corrupted.
errors.probeParseFailed: Could not parse the inspection output.
